title: absorber operation
description: Operation block of a counter-current multistage gas absorber (Kremser group method).  Hardware-only: specify the number of theoretical stages (the column height).  The recovery of each solute is a RESULT, computed from the absorption factor A_i = L/(K_i V) and the Kremser equation; a soluble gas with a Henry's-law entry uses K = H(T)/P.  For 'I need 95 % recovery' wrap the unit in a DesignSpec outerDict that manipulates $stages with a target on this unit's recovery_<solute> KPI.

stages.title: Theoretical stages (hardware)
stages.description: Number of equilibrium stages = the column height.  More stages give more recovery (the Kremser chart).
